name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
For every {Gland Division} consumed by {Clamorous Ocean}, Aurita's DMG output for the rest of the battle +[Arg3]% ATK. When at least 20 {Gland Division} cards are consumed in a Boss Battle, {Gland Division} deals +1 instance of DMG when played or consumed. The first [Arg4] {Gland Division} played each turn does not add {Arithmetica Harmony} stacks.
